leadText: This article is about the type-enhancing item. For the Pokémon-repelling item, see Cleanse Tag. The Spell Tag (Japanese: のろいのおふだ Cursed O-fuda) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves by 20%.
